name: Marvel
bio: Marvel soundtrack pages can still perform because Guardians of the Galaxy revived older songs at scale and turned them into new catalog earners.
notable_for: Soundtrack-driven catalog rediscovery rather than original-artist economics alone.
career_highlight: Awesome Mix Vol. 1 became a modern example of film placement creating a second commercial life for older recordings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Marvel's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Marvel's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
